concerns: Two-file split (url-seed.ts + resolve-seed.ts) adds unnecessary indirection — resolveSeed is a 5-line function that should live in url-seed.ts alongside read/write functions
Step 1 description should explicitly require URLSearchParams to preserve existing query parameters, not just mention it in the risks section
Plan should clarify that readSeedFromUrl returns null for empty-value case (?seed=) — mentioned in test recommendations but not in the function spec
Plan should commit to a single pattern for exposing the resolved seed from main.ts (exported getter vs const) rather than splitting the guidance between steps and risks
Test file references to 'US-001 through US-006' are slightly misleading since US-005 tests don't exist yet — minor wording issue
